prompt: I just finished a feature. All my changes are staged. Write me a good commit message.

assertions.text: Agent uses git diff --cached (not git diff) to inspect staged changes
Agent produces exactly one commit message (not multiple, since files are already staged)
Commit message subject line is under 72 characters
Commit message uses imperative mood (e.g., 'add' not 'added' or 'adds')
Agent does not propose to unstage or restage files
